title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on ethics, privacy, and the human element.

questions.question: Are you worried about the amount of data AI systems have about our personal lives?
Should there be laws to prevent AI from mimicking human voices and faces?

script.text: Are you worried about the amount of data AI systems have about our personal lives?
Should there be laws to prevent AI from mimicking human voices and faces?
What is the one thing you think a human will always do better than a machine?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
